creator: marino@FreeBSD.org
text:
"pkg install nrpe" installs the net-mgmt/nrpe package
"pkg install nrpe-ssl" installs the net-mgmt/nrpe-ssl package

So they are "along side" each other already.

It looks to me that you just installed the wrong package, it's that simple.


see this page:
http://www.freshports.org/net-mgmt/nrpe-ssl

About halfway down, you see:
"To add the package: pkg install net-mgmt/nrpe-ssl"

So in the future, just look at freshports for the correct command.
